review: I worked with Mike Belisle to purchase my condo in Bellingham in the fall of 2018 and to sell it in February/March 2021, and I would HIGHLY recommend Mike to anyone looking to buy or sell.Mike is extremely professional, knowledgeable, and a go-getter. As both a seller and buyer, he made himself keenly aware of my goals, timeline, and expectations, and worked to accomplish successful results! He knows the WA state real estate markets in and out, and is able to advise well. He is a fantastic communicator, and very upfront, as well as quick to respond. His assistant Carey was also amazing during the sale of my home. I would recommend them to anyone (and already have others working with them to sell their homes who are also quite thrilled with the experience).

businessResponse.comment: Thank you Sherry! I really enjoyed getting to know you. If you ever need anything please call. Have a great day.

review: I rarely leave feedback, however, Mike went above and beyond what I expected!I called Mike about 10 months previous to help us with an offer we wanted to make. That offer fell through but Mike listened to what we were looking for and when a great house (the one we purchased) came on the market months later he called to let us know it was what we were looking for. It was perfect! Mike got the purchase offer through for the amount we wanted to pay and closed the deal quickly. We were purchasing from outside the state and Mike was our 'boots on the ground'...he was knowledgeable and quick to reply to all questions, send documentation expediently and has a deep pool of high quality resources available to make the whole home buying process go smoothly. This is by far the best home buying experience we have had, and we have had quite a few. Mike's assistant Jillian was super nice and professional, too. Would highly recommend the MJB Real Estate Group.
I have used Mike on several purchase and sales over the years and would use no one else. He is experienced, highly professional, accessible, responsive, and consistently works beyond my expectations.
